title: jasminum agastyamalayanum
intro: Jasminum agastyamalayanum is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the Agastya Jasmine. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum agastyamalayanum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing cognitive function. Herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
